description:
Return a list of Companies visible to the User.

NOTE: This endpoint does not require the ['Procore-Company-Id' header]
(https://developers.procore.com/documentation/tutorial-mpz)
to be included on a request.

parameters.name: include_free_companies
parameters.description: By default the endpoint excludes free companies. Provide include_free_companies=true to include them

my_company.description: The current user is an active employee of this company. This will only return as true for a single company in the response.
